validation:is-email.doc:name: VALIDATE: Email
validation:is-email.message: #["Email provided is not in the correct format. Email provided: '$(payload.email)'"]

logger.doc:name: INFO: No Email
logger.message: #[import toString from dw::util::Coercions --- "[$(toString(now()))] No email has been found in this payload."]

validation:is-true.doc:name: VALIDATE: Phone Number
validation:is-true.message: #["Phone number provided is not in the correct format. Phone number provided: '$(payload.phone)'"]

logger.doc:name: INFO: No Phone Number
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 import toString from dw::util::Coercions --- "[$(toString(now()))] No phone has been found in this payload."]

validation:is-url.doc:name: VALIDATE: Website
validation:is-url.message: #["Website provided is not in the correct format. Website provided: '$(payload.website)'"]

logger.doc:name: INFO: No Website
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 import toString from dw::util::Coercions --- "[$(toString(now()))] No website URL has been found in this payload."]

logger.doc:name: INFO: No Name
logger.message: #[import toString from dw::util::Coercions --- "[$(toString(now()))] No name has been found in this payload."]

salesforce:create.doc:name: CREATE: Supplier
salesforce:create.salesforce:records: #[%dw 2.0 --- [{ UUID__c: vars.id, Name: payload.name, (Email__c: payload.email) if (payload.email != null), (Phone__c: payload.phone) if (payload.phone != null), (Website__c: payload.website) if (payload.website != null), (Status__c: payload.status) if (payload.status != null) }]]

logger.doc:name: INFO: Supplier Created
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 import toString from dw::util::Coercions --- "[$(toString(now()))] Supplier Account has been created: $(write(payload, 'application/json'))"]

salesforce:upsert.doc:name: UPDATE: Supplier
salesforce:upsert.salesforce:records: #[[{ UUID__c: vars.id, (Name: payload.name) if (payload.name?), (Email__c: payload.email) if (payload.email != null), (Phone__c: payload.phone) if (payload.phone != null), (Website__c: payload.website) if (payload.website != null), (Status__c: payload.status) if (payload.status != null) }]]

salesforce:query.doc:name: QUERY: Supplier by Id
salesforce:query.salesforce:salesforce-query: SELECT UUID__c, Name, Email__c, Phone__c, Website__c, Status__c, CreatedDate, LastModifiedDate FROM Supplier__c WHERE UUID__c = ':id'

logger.doc:name: INFO: Raw Query Result
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 import toString from dw::util::Coercions --- "Raw Query Result: $(write(payload, 'application/json'))"]

ee:message.ee:set-payload:
%dw 2.0 output application/json
var item = payload[0] --- { id: item.UUID__c, name: item.Name, email: item.Email__c, phone: item.Phone__c, website: item.Website__c, status: item.Status__c, createdAt: item.CreatedDate, updatedAt: item.LastModifiedDate }

set-variable.doc:name: SET: soql

salesforce:query-all.doc:name: QUERY: Matching Suppliers

logger.doc:name: INFO: Raw Query Result
logger.message: #[%dw 2.0 import toString from dw::util::Coercions --- "Raw Query Result: $(write(payload, 'application/json'))"]
